languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

languages.text: "Мы едва ступили на поверхность планеты, а ты уже расписал, сколько они задолжали Империуму. Бессердечный ты ашмаг, подожди еще хотя бы лет пятьдесят!"
"We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"
languages.original_text: "Мы едва ступили на поверхность планеты, а ты уже расписал, сколько они задолжали Империуму. Бессердечный ты ашмаг, подожди еще хотя бы лет пятьдесят!"

traits.locale_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"
"We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"
"We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

languages.text: 「我々はこの惑星に降り立ったばかりで、お前はすでに帝国にどれだけの借金があるのかを計算したのか。冷酷な灰魔、少なくとも50年、彼らを免除してくれ！」
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: 「我々はこの惑星に降り立ったばかりで、お前はすでに帝国にどれだけの借金があるのかを計算したのか。冷酷な灰魔、少なくとも50年、彼らを免除してくれ！」

languages.text: « À peine avons-nous mis les pieds sur cette planète que vous avez déjà calculé ce qu'elle doit à l'Imperium. Espèce d'ashmag sans cœur, épargnez-les pendant encore cinquante ans au minimum ! »
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: « À peine avons-nous mis les pieds sur cette planète que vous avez déjà calculé ce qu'elle doit à l'Imperium. Espèce d'ashmag sans cœur, épargnez-les pendant encore cinquante ans au minimum ! »

languages.text: "Wir haben kaum einen Fuß auf den Planeten gesetzt und Ihr habt schon berechnet, wie viel er dem Imperium schuldet? Herzloser Ashmag. Lasst sie wenigstens fünfzig weitere Jahre in Ruhe!"
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben kaum einen Fuß auf den Planeten gesetzt und Ihr habt schon berechnet, wie viel er dem Imperium schuldet? Herzloser Ashmag. Lasst sie wenigstens fünfzig weitere Jahre in Ruhe!"

languages.text: "Gezegen yüzeyine daha yeni ayak bastık, sense şimdiden İmparatorluk'a ne kadar borçlu olduklarını hesapladın. Kalpsiz bürokrat seni, en azından bir elli yıl daha rahat bırak insanları!"
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: "Gezegen yüzeyine daha yeni ayak bastık, sense şimdiden İmparatorluk'a ne kadar borçlu olduklarını hesapladın. Kalpsiz bürokrat seni, en azından bir elli yıl daha rahat bırak insanları!"

languages.text: «Apenas hemos puesto pie en la superficie del planeta y ya ha calculado cuánto deben al Imperium. ¡Ashmag desalmado, déjelos tranquilos por lo menos otros cincuenta años!».
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: «Apenas hemos puesto pie en la superficie del planeta y ya ha calculado cuánto deben al Imperium. ¡Ashmag desalmado, déjelos tranquilos por lo menos otros cincuenta años!».

languages.text: “我们才刚踏上行星地表，你就已经算出他们欠帝国多少了。你这没心肝的坏种，至少再给他们宽限五十年吧！”
languages.original_text: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"

traits.locale_text: “我们才刚踏上行星地表，你就已经算出他们欠帝国多少了。你这没心肝的坏种，至少再给他们宽限五十年吧！”
